notes: Bottle-filling station on first floor near food court

name: ASU Sustainability E-Waste Drop-Off
notes: Accepts phones, laptops, batteries, cables, and small electronics. Open Mon–Fri 8am–5pm.

notes: Drop box for batteries and small electronics near the circulation desk

name: Memorial Union E-Waste Kiosk
notes: Accepts phones, tablets, and batteries. Located near the information desk.
